bead.title: Stage 1.7: rewrite FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md (full rewrite)
bead.description: Full rewrite of docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md. URL scheme /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/* preserved (user confirmed correct for multi-node reality, not cargo-cult). Every TC-NNN identifier maps to a new Playwright spec filename. Uses Houdini query patterns in examples. Zero React references. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #7.
bead.acceptance: (1) `grep -iE 'react|tanstack|react-router' docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md` returns ZERO matches. (2) Every TC-NNN maps to a Playwright spec filename. (3) Examples use Houdini `.gql` files and `+page.ts` load functions.
